title: besseya alpina
intro: Besseya alpina, also known as mountain beakgrape, is a perennial plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery, due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Besseya alpina include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Besseya alpina can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
